who: HR teams in tech startups using Greenhouse for hiring
offer: For HR teams in tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire productivity. We provide an onboarding checklist generator instead of manual onboarding checklists and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in new hire productivity.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR teams seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on onboarding workflows
DM outreach to HR teams with demo video links
Engage in community forums for HR tools sharing
try_it: Let users try customizable onboarding templates and progress tracking for new hires on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video highlighting the onboarding process
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing onboarding data
Allow one-click export of onboarding reports
Reduce steps required in the onboarding process
